description.value:
Keyword: [Hindered] Effect: Take [[/damage 2]] damage per stack at the end of each of your turns. Multiple bleeding effects add together (2 stacks = [[/damage 4]] damage per turn, 3 stacks = [[/damage 6]] damage per turn). If at 0 HP or below, bleeding damage stops. Add your total bleeding stack count to both dice when making stabilization saves. Recovery: Magical healing removes all bleeding stacks. Target may Use 1 action to make a [[/check skill=medicine]] to reduce bleeding.

  • 2 successes: Remove 1 bleeding stack

Ally Assistance: An ally within 5 feet may Use 1 action to make a [[/check skill=medicine]].

  • 1 successes: Remove 1 bleeding stack
  • 2 successes: Remove all bleeding stacks

damageTick.chatMessage: Take [[/damage 2]] damage per stack from Bleeding
